start.text: Chargy, you have yet to complete your task
Right; I still need to charge all the devices in goober world

out of battery.text: Really? Just, go to the battery and refill. How many times have you done this?

Goobers?.text: Those are Goobers. More specifically, Grass Goobers. They are the main inhabitants of this world.
They are very friendly, but they can be a bit... aggressive when provoked.

Unusual activity.text: Chargy, I have gotten reports of unusual activity in the rainbow roads
There is a forming black hole.
If we don't stop it, it may be the end of this world.
Powery, we don't even have the equipment for that. Litterally how?!
Head to the spacestation and we'll talk there.
